> Updated: 2026-04-09

(Part 1)

| [Xiaomi: MiMo-V2-Omni](https://llmcosts.dev/models/mimo-v2-omni) | Xiaomi | $0.4 | $2.0 | $None | 262,144 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
